description: Displays the status of a running deployment instance. A deployment instance is a running process that has registered itself with the platform using a deployment token. One deployment can have multiple instances running on different hosts.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

config.description: The configuration that the deployment was started with. The format of the config is version specific and subject to change.
config.title: config

currentVersion.description: The current version of the deployment.
currentVersion.title: currentVersion

diagnostics.description: List of diagnostics for this instance.
diagnostics.title: diagnostics

hostname.description: The name of the host where the deployment instance is running.
hostname.title: hostname

parentID.description: The ID of the parent resource.
parentID.title: parentID

ping.description: The last ping recorded for the deployment instance.
ping.title: ping

publicKeys.description: References of the public keys that this deployment instance has access to.
publicKeys.title: publicKeys

start.description: The start time for the deployment instance.
start.title: start

status.description: The status of the deployment instance.
status.title: status

tokenID.description: The ID of the deployment token this deployment instance authenticated with.
tokenID.title: tokenID

title: DeploymentInstance
